MARCInd1Label: Type of corporate name entry element
MARCSubfield: a, b, c, d, g, n, u
MARCTagCondition1: $e or $4 is not provided or is provided with a value that does not map to any RDA URI from the Agent Relator Transformation Table
MARCTagCondition2: no $1 and $0 that can be converted into a rwo uri
RDA Registry Label: has related corporate body of work
Justification for Mapping: If we do not have a Relator value that maps to an RDA URI (see the bullet point above), we cannot assume that the agent described by an Agent Main entry field is related to a work; it could be related to an expression (e.g., a performer); it should not be related to a manifestation or an item. Therefore, we can use a Work relationship (A related agent of expression is also a related agent of the work that is realized by the expression as a shortcut that ignores the expression)
Transformation Notes:
<work> rdawo:P10314 <corpBodyIRI> . // has related corporate body of work
<corpBodyIRI> rdaad:P50375 “stripEndStop(concatenateOA($a, $b, $c, $d, $g, $n, $u))” . // has access point for corporate body

MARCInd1Label: Type of corporate name entry element
Transformation Notes: <corporateIRI> rdawd:P50006 "$0 or $1 value". // has identifier for corporate body

MARCInd1Label: Type of corporate name entry element
MARCTagCondition1: $e or $4 is provided and maps to any RDA URI from the Agent Relator Transformation Table
Justification for Mapping: An Agent Main entry field was originally supposed to tell us who is responsible for the Work described by the record, except in special situations (e.g., music albums). But, especially now that we are adding multiple Agent Relator values to Agent main entry fields (in $e or $4), any of those values can be for any WEMI relationship. Fortunately (when the MARC record is describing a single-part work) as long as a Relator value maps to an RDA URI, it will relate the agent to the appropriate WEMI.
Transformation Notes:
<entity> RDA property <$1>
<$1> nomen property <nomenIRI>
<nomenIRI> rdand:P80068 “stripEndStop(concatenateOA($a, $b, $c, $d, $g, $n, $u))” .// has nomen string
<nomenIRI> rdan:P80069 <scheme> .// has scheme of nomen


If $2 is approved source, use rdaao:P50407 .// has authorized access point for corporate body. If unapproved use rdaao:P50375 .// has access point for corporate body
- CP 2024-12-13
